title: Operations Engineer (HCM) - Contract
description:
Company Overview

Zenith Infotech (S) Pte Ltd. was started in 1997, primarily with the vision of offering state-of-the-art IT Professionals and solutions to various organizations and thereby helping them increase their productivity and competitiveness. From deployment of one person to formation of whole IT teams, Zenith Infotech has helped clients with their staff augmentation needs. Zenith offers opportunity to be engaged in long term projects with large IT savvy companies, Consulting organizations, System Integrators, Government, and MNCs.

Job Summary

You will collaborate with HR practitioners to ensure the accuracy and integrity of master data within e-HR systems. By analyzing operational issues and coordinating data management activities, you will drive data quality improvements and support compliance reporting to authorities.

Responsibilities

  • Collaborate with HR practitioners to maintain master data integrity in e-HR by executing data profiling, patching, rectifications, and corrections
  • Analyze operational data issues, provide expert consultation, and implement effective data rectification solutions
  • Coordinate sequential deletion and insertion of HR events with data owners to uphold data consistency and accuracy
  • Prepare and present detailed data reports and statistics for authority review and endorsement
  • Update and maintain documentation including Standard Operating Procedures (SOP) and Data Catalogue to reflect current processes and data standards

Required competencies and certifications

  • Demonstrated knowledge of information technology with a focus on SAP HCM ERP or HCM SaaS data design and management
  • Proven ability to investigate and diagnose data issues and propose actionable solutions for resolution
  • Competency in applying Microsoft Excel functions to manipulate and analyze data sets
  • Strong planning and coordination skills to manage data operations and stakeholder collaboration
  • Effective written, verbal communication, and presentation skills to convey data insights and updates clearly
  • Ability to work independently and proactively while contributing as a responsible and conscientious team player

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Proficiency in SQL programming to support advanced data querying and manipulation
